summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of sidebar restructure (3 section headings) and new Logs/Reports pages completed. All 18 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
NavSection[] structure with optional heading prop works correctly for 3 sections
Logs page uses useMemo for efficient filtering
Reports page uses recharts correctly for AreaChart, BarChart, and PieChart
Collapsed sidebar shows dividers instead of section headings as expected
seed_data_creation: Mock data defined in Logs.tsx (MOCK_LOGS) and Reports.tsx (CAMPAIGN_PERF, AGENT_PERF, CHANNEL_BREAKDOWN, SAVED_REPORTS)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar restructure and Logs/Reports pages fully working. All data is MOCKED within page components. Previous iterations tested Agents section and Tools page - all passed.

sidebar_3_section_headings.details: BUILD, PERFORMANCE, ENGAGEMENT section headings visible in expanded sidebar

sidebar_build_section.details: BUILD section contains: Campaigns, Agents, Tools

sidebar_performance_section.details: PERFORMANCE section contains: Analytics, Logs, Reports

sidebar_dashboard_standalone.details: Dashboard is standalone at top of sidebar

sidebar_settings_standalone.details: Settings is standalone at bottom of sidebar

sidebar_collapsed_state.details: Collapsed sidebar shows icons only with dividers between sections, headings hidden

logs_page_renders.details: Logs page at /logs renders with activity feed subtitle

logs_level_filters.details: Level filters with counts: All(10), Success(3), Info(3), Warning(2), Error(2)

logs_source_filter.details: Source filter dropdown with options: All Sources, Agents, Campaigns, System

logs_expandable_entries.details: Log entries are expandable showing details and metadata tags

logs_search_filtering.details: Search filtering works - 'CRM' search returned 1 result

reports_overview_tab.details: Reports Overview tab loads with charts

reports_4_stat_cards.details: 4 stat cards: Campaign Reach (2.76L), Agent Calls (2,247), Total Spend (9.67L), Conversions (12,470)

reports_channel_distribution_chart.details: Channel Distribution PieChart (donut) renders with 6 channels

reports_top_performing_assets.details: Top Performing Assets section shows 3 items (Campaign, Agent, Channel)

reports_saved_reports_tab.details: Saved Reports tab shows 4 report cards with Export buttons

mocked_data_note: ALL log and report data is MOCKED using static constants within page components. No backend API calls are made.
